_comment: PHASE 2 — Friday Brief NotebookLM MCP skeleton. NOT wired into .mcp.json yet because the vendored repos haven't been cloned and pinned, and because a live entry for an unbuilt server would break MCP startup. Merge these entries into .mcp.json only after completing docs/runbooks/friday-brief-vendoring.md.

notebooklm-read._comment: Phase 2: vendored fork of PleasePrompto/notebooklm-mcp, pinned to a specific commit SHA. Runs inside a sandboxed Chrome profile under ${SANDBOX_DIR}/chrome-nlm.

notebooklm-write._comment: Phase 2: vendored fork of qiaomu/anything-to-notebooklm, pinned to a specific commit SHA. Shares the sandboxed Chrome profile with notebooklm-read.
